About Match  

⚔️ Girona vs Barça – Derby Night at Montilivi 🔵🔴

FC Barcelona face Girona FC tonight at the sold-out Estadi Montilivi.

🔥 What’s at Stake?

 • Competition: La Liga

 • Barça are 2nd, one point behind Real Madrid CF.

 • A win sends them back to the top.

🚑 Team News

 • OUT: Rashford, Pedri, Gavi, Christensen

 • BACK: Raphinha available

After the Copa setback, this is all about reaction. Montilivi will be hostile — Barça must show character. 💙❤️

🔵🔴 The last time FC Barcelona played against Girona at the Municipal de Montilivi stadium, it was a perfect match for Barça, winning convincingly with a 1-4 result! Tomorrow we face a really tough game. 💪🏻🔥
author: Vicecap
